data.title: Stephanie Addeo of Rubin Rudman named 'Up & Coming Lawyer' by Massachusetts Lawyers Weekly for 2026.
data.description: In Boston on January 20, 2026, Rubin Rudman shared the news that Stephanie Addeo, a lawyer at the firm specializing in Fiduciary Litigation and Trusts & Estates, has been recognized as a 2026 "Up & Coming Lawyer" by Massachusetts Lawyers Weekly. This accolade celebrates outstanding local attorneys who have demonstrated considerable promise in their field.

data.title: Agrace to build America's first Hogeweyk-inspired Dementia Village in Madison, Wis. revolutionizing memory care.
data.description: Madison, Wisconsin, January 20, 2026 - Agrace, a prominent nonprofit offering hospice care, palliative care, and dementia care services, revealed intentions to construct the Ellen & Peter Johnson Dementia Village at Agrace. This project marks the debut of a Hogeweyk-inspired dementia care community.

data.title: ISACA Awards 2026 recognizes outstanding tech professionals worldwide for their contributions in IT audit, risk, governance, privacy, and cybersecurity.
data.description: In Schaumburg, Illinois, ISACA is recognizing outstanding technology professionals worldwide for their significant contributions to the industry. The 2026 Global Achievement Awards and Hall of Fame induction ceremony celebrate individuals excelling in IT audit, risk, governance, privacy, and cybersecurity. These professionals showcase exceptional dedication, making a remarkable impact on their organizations and communities. Their achievements highlight the crucial role played by ISACA members and tech experts globally.

data.title: Global study by Oliver Wyman Forum reveals shifts in human sentiment, impacts on economy and health. Analysis based on insights from 300,000 Voices project.
data.description: Oliver Wyman Forum, the research arm of the global consulting firm Oliver Wyman and a part of Marsh (NYSE: MRSH), has revealed a new study on consumer and workplace attitudes. Drawing from their extensive five-year-long project, 300,000 Voices, the report titled "300,000 Voices...And What They Tell Us About The Next Era Of Global Change" highlights the impact of geoeconomic and technological changes. These transformations are not only causing emotional stress but are also fundamentally altering societal dynamics.

data.title: New 2026 Mazda CX-5 model boasts advanced safety features ensuring protection for all on the road.
data.description: A recent video released by Mazda North American Operations showcases the enhanced safety features of the 2026 CX-5. The video, presented by Jennifer Morrison, Director of Vehicle Safety, emphasizes how the all-new model prioritizes protection for all road users. The CX-5 boasts advanced safety technologies to ensure the well-being of everyone on the road. This release was made public in Irvine, California on January 20, 2026.

data.title: Family Care Center opens new outpatient behavioral health clinic in Queen Creek, Arizona to improve access to mental health care for children, teens, and adults. Over 90% of patients show significant improvement.
data.description: Arizona remains among the states with limited access to behavioral health services. The recently opened Family Care Center clinic aims to enhance integrated mental health care for children, adolescents, and adults in the local community. Over 90% of patients have reported significant improvement since receiving care at the Family Care Center.

data.title: Krispy Kreme celebrates baby born in their parking lot turning 1 by offering zero delivery for orders this Wednesday-Thursday.
data.description: In Charlotte, N.C., in honor of "Baby Dallas," born on January 22, 2025, in the Krispy Kreme parking lot during a snowstorm in Dothan, AL, the first birthday celebration includes a special offer. To mark this occasion, Krispy Kreme is providing free delivery for all orders placed at krispykreme.com or using the company's app on Wednesday and Thursday. This offer is valid for a variety of doughnuts, making it a sweet deal for customers. Parents Sha'Nya Bennett are thrilled to see their baby turning 1, and this promotion adds to the joyous occasion.

data.title: Rio Tinto adds 25MW solar facility in Kennecott, Utah, increasing total solar capacity to 30MW, reducing Scope 2 emissions by 6%.
data.description: Rio Tinto Plc (NYSE: RIO) recently activated a new solar facility at its Kennecott copper mine in Utah. This move highlights the company's commitment to a more sustainable and low-carbon critical-minerals supply chain. The new 25-megawatt solar installation supplements a previous 5MW project finished in 2023, resulting in a total solar capacity of 30 megawatts for Kennecott. The collective solar energy generated has the capacity to power approximately 1,026 average U.S. households annually. By implementing this project, Rio Tinto aims to reduce Kennecott's Scope 2 emissions by around 6%. The construction of the solar facility is part of Rio Tinto's broader strategy to promote sustainability and transition towards renewable energy sources.

data.title: Portugal and Hungary block Polymarket, amid global crackdown on prediction markets despite denials of gambling involvement.
data.description: As regulatory scrutiny intensifies worldwide, prediction market firms are denying allegations of providing gambling services. Global enforcement measures are increasing in the face of this controversy.

data.title: Oscilar and evolv Consulting collaborate to streamline risk infrastructure for financial institutions, achieving success with major neobank.
data.description: In a successful collaboration with a prominent neobank, Oscilar, the innovative AI Risk Decisioning™ platform, and evolv Consulting have demonstrated a rapid and superior implementation. The joint effort, unveiled on Jan. 20, 2026, in Dallas and Palo Alto, California, showcased the effectiveness and efficiency of Oscilar's AI-powered risk decisioning technology. This partnership underscores the ability of Oscilar's platform to deliver high-quality solutions swiftly. The collaboration signifies a significant milestone in the fintech industry, highlighting the value of integrating advanced AI capabilities for improved risk management. Keep updated for more insights on this industry development.

data.title: OCuSOFT Inc. introduces Retaine® Omega Forté™ liquid supplement for dry eye management. #EyeCare #Health #Nutrition
data.description: In Rosenberg, Texas, on January 20, 2026, OCuSOFT Inc., a private eye care pharmaceutical company known for creating the initial eyelid hygiene cleansing solution, has introduced Retaine® Omega Forté™. This new product is a meticulously refined omega-3 nutritional supplement designed to support eye health.

data.title: PNC Financial Services Group reported Q4 earnings of $4.88/share, revenue of $6.07 billion, exceeding expectations hugely. CEO optimistic for future growth.
data.description: PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) announced its fiscal fourth-quarter 2025 results, surpassing expectations. The bank reported earnings per share of $4.88, exceeding the estimated $4.21. Additionally, its quarterly revenue amounted to $6.07 billion, surpassing the projected $5.96 billion. CEO Bill Demchak expressed satisfaction, stating that 2025 marked a successful year with record revenue, controlled expenses, and a 21% increase in earnings per share due to strong execution across all business lines. Demchak added that the company is entering 2026 with momentum and optimism regarding future opportunities. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Over 30,000 attendees from 85+ countries gather at VMX 2026 in Orlando, the world's largest veterinary conference.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida on January 20, 2026, the Orange County Convention Center is abuzz with the gathering of approximately 30,000 veterinary professionals, innovators, and animal health companies hailing from more than 85 countries for VMX 2026, which stands as the largest veterinary conference worldwide. The event serves as a platform for continuing education and networking opportunities within the industry.

data.title: Syngene International extends collaboration with Bristol Myers Squibb until 2035, a contract research organization.
data.description: In Bengaluru, India, on January 20, 2026, Syngene International disclosed an extension of its partnership with Bristol Myers Squibb until 2035. Syngene International is a CRDMO company based in India, offering research, development, and manufacturing services worldwide. This extended collaboration indicates a continued strategic alliance between the two companies for an additional 9 years, showcasing the importance of their long-standing relationship.

data.title: Metacon gets 50M SEK temporary project financing from Fenja Capital to cover working capital needs.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Metacon AB (publ), a company based in Stockholm, announced it has obtained temporary project financing at market rates. The company received a total of 50 million Swedish Krona (SEK) in gross proceeds from Fenja Capital II A/S. This loan is specifically designed to address Metacon's current working capital requirements.
